title: Qwen S2S
description: Shortcut for 'llm' with vendor automatically set to 'qwen'. Connects the caller to an Alibaba Qwen Omni-Realtime model (e.g. qwen3.5-omni-plus-realtime, qwen3.5-omni-flash-realtime) for real-time speech-to-speech voice conversation. auth takes the DashScope apiKey (required; keys are region-bound) and an optional host — default dashscope-intl.aliyuncs.com (international); set a workspace-scoped host (ws-<workspaceId>.<region>.maas.aliyuncs.com) or dashscope.aliyuncs.com for the China (Beijing) region.

vendor.description: The LLM vendor (always 'qwen' for this shortcut).

session_update.instructions: You are a helpful voice assistant.
